mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, display_name, email, phone, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password_hash, display_name, email, phone, status, last_login_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{lastLoginAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, r.built_in AS builtIn, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.id

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.code, p.name, p.type, p.parent_id AS parentId, p.path, p.method, p.description, p.sort_order AS sortOrder, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.id ASC
